text: siddhiḥ sādhye satām astu prasādāt tasya dhūrjaṭeḥ
jāhnavīphenalekheva yanmūrdhni śaśinaḥ kalā
atha kathāmukham
asti bhāgīrathītīre pāṭaliputranāmadheyaṃ nagaram
tatra sarvasvāmiguṇopetaḥ sudarśano nāma narapatir āsīt
sa bhūpatir ekadā kenāpi pāṭhyamānaṃ ślokadvayaṃ śuśrāva
anekasaṃśayocchedi parokṣārthasya darśakam
sarvasya locanaṃ śāstraṃ yasya nāsty andha eva saḥ
yauvanaṃ dhanasampattiḥ prabhutvam avivekitā
ekaikam apy anarthāya kim u yatra catuṣṭayam
ity ākarṇyātmanaḥ putrāṇām anadhigataśāstrāṇāṃ nityam unmārg
ko 'rthaḥ putreṇa jātena yo na vidvān na dhārmikaḥ
kāṇena cakṣuṣā kiṃ vā cakṣuḥ pīḍaiva kevalam
ajātamṛtamūrkhāṇāṃ varam ādyau na cāntimaḥ
sakṛd duḥkhakarāv ādyāv antimas tu pade pade
kiṃ ca
varaṃ garbhasrāvo varam api ca naivābhigamanaṃ varaṃ jātaḥ p
varaṃ vandhyā bhāryā varam api ca garbheṣu vasatir na vāvidv
sa jāto yena jātena yāti vaṃśaḥ samunnatim
parivartini saṃsāre mṛtaḥ ko vā na jāyate
anyac ca
guṇigaṇagaṇanārambhe na patati kaṭhinī sasambhramād yasya
tenāmbā yadi sutinī vada vandhyā kīdṛśī bhavati
api ca
dāne tapasi śaurye ca yasya na prathitaṃ manaḥ
vidyāyām arthalābhe ca mātur uccāra eva saḥ
aparaṃ ca
varam eko guṇī putro na ca mūrkhaśatair api
ekaś candramās tamo hanti na ca tārāgaṇair api
puṇyatīrthe kṛtaṃ yena tapaḥ kvāpy atiduṣkaram
tasya putro bhaved vaśyaḥ samṛddho dhārmikaḥ sudhīḥ
śruto hitopadeśo 'yaṃ pāṭavaṃ saṃskṛtoktiṣu
vācāṃ sarvatra vaicitryaṃ nītividyāṃ dadāti ca
tathā coktam
arthāgamo nityam arogitā ca priyā ca bhāryā priyavādinī ca
vaśyaś ca putro 'rthakarī ca vidyā ṣaḍ jīvalokasya sukhāni r
ko dhanyo bahubhiḥ putraiḥ kuśūlāpūraṇāḍhakaiḥ
varam ekaḥ kulālambī yatra viśrūyate pitā
ṛṇakartā pitā śatrur mātā ca vyabhicāriṇī
bhāryā rūpavatī śatruḥ putraḥ śatrur apaṇḍitaḥ
yasya kasya prasūto 'pi guṇavān pūjyate naraḥ
dhanurvaṃśaviśuddho 'pi nirguṇaḥ kiṃ kariṣyati
hā hā putraka nādhītaṃ gatāsv etāsu rātriṣu
tena tvaṃ viduṣāṃ madhye paṅke gaur iva sīdasi
tat katham idānīm ete mama putrā guṇavantaḥ kriyantām yataḥ
āhāranidrābhayamaithunāni sāmānyam etat paśubhir narāṇām
jñānaṃ narāṇām adhiko viśeṣo jñānena hīnāḥ paśubhiḥ samānāḥ
yataḥ
dharmārthakāmamokṣāṇāṃ yasyaiko 'pi na vidyate
ajāgalastanasyeva tasya janma nirarthakam
yac cocyate
āyuḥ karma ca vittaṃ ca vidyā nidhanam eva ca
pañcaitāni hi sṛjyante garbhasthasyaiva dehinaḥ
kiṃ ca
avaśyaṃ bhāvino bhāvā bhavanti mahatām api
nagnatvaṃ nīlakaṇṭhasya mahāhiśayanaṃ hareḥ
anyac ca
yad abhāvi na tad bhāvi bhāvi cen na tad anyathā
iti cintāviṣaghno 'yam agadaḥ kiṃ na pīyate
ajarāmaravat prājño vidyāmarthaṃ ca cintayet
gṛhīta iva keśeṣu mṛtyunā dharmamācaret
etat kāryākṣamāṇāṃ keṣāṃcid ālasyavacanam
puruṣakārautkārṣyam āha
yathā hy ekena cakreṇa na rathasya gatir bhavet
tathā puruṣakāreṇa vinā daivaṃ na sidhyati
tathā ca
pūrvajanmakṛtaṃ karma tad daivam iti kathyate
tasmāt puruṣakāreṇa yatnaṃ kuryād atandritaḥ
na daivam api saṃcintya tyajed udyogam ātmanaḥ
anudyogena tailāni tilebhyo nāptum arhati
anyac ca
udyoginaṃ puruṣasiṃham upaiti lakṣmīr daivena deyam iti kāpu
daivaṃ nihatya kuru pauruṣam ātmaśaktyā yatne kṛte yadi na s
yathā mṛtpiṇḍataḥ kartā kurute yad yad icchati
evam ātmakṛtaṃ karma mānavaḥ pratipadyate
kākatālīyavat prāptaṃ dṛṣṭvāpi nidhim agrataḥ
na svayaṃ daivam ādatte puruṣārtham apekṣate
udyamena hi sidhyanti kāryāṇi na manorathaiḥ
nahi suptasya siṃhasya praviśanti mukhe mṛgāḥ
tathā coktam
mātā śatruḥ pitā vairī yena bālo na pāṭhitaḥ
na śobhate sabhāmadhye haṃsamadhye bako yathā
rūpayauvanasampannā viśālakulasambhavāḥ
vidyāhīnā na śobhante nirgandhā iva kiṃśukāḥ
aparac ca
pustakeṣu ca nādhītaṃ nādhītaṃ gurusaṃnidhau
na śobhate sabhāmadhye jāragarbha iva striyāḥ
sarvadravyeṣu vidyaiva dravyam āhur anuttamam
ahāryatvād anarghatvād akṣayatvāc ca sarvadā
etac cintayitvā rājā paṇḍitasabhāṃ kāritavān
rājovāca bho bhoḥ paṇḍitāḥ śrūyatāṃ mama vacanam
asti kaścid evambhūto vidvān yo mama putrāṇāṃ nityam unmārga
kācaḥ kāñcanasaṃsargād dhatte mārakatīr dyutīḥ
tathā satsaṃnidhānena mūrkho yāti pravīṇatām
uktaṃ ca
hīyate hi matis tāta hīnaiḥ saha samāgamāt
samaiś ca samatām eti viśiṣṭaiś ca viśiṣṭatām
atrāntare viṣṇuśarmanāmā mahāpaṇḍitaḥ sakalanītiśāstratattva
tat mayā nītiṃ grāhayituṃ śakyante
yataḥ
nādravye nihitā kācit kriyā phalavatī bhavet
na vyāpāraśatenāpi śukavat pāṭhyate bakaḥ
anyac ca
asmiṃs tu nirguṇaṃ gotre nāpatyam upajāyate
ākare padyarāgānāṃ janma kācamaṇeḥ kutaḥ
ato 'haṃ ṣaṇmāsābhyantare bhavatputrān nītiśāstrābhijñān kar
rājā savinayaṃ punar uvāca
kīṭo 'pi sumanaḥsaṅgād ārohati satāṃ śiraḥ
aśmāpi yāti devatvaṃ mahadbhiḥ supratiṣṭhitaḥ
anyac ca
yathodayagirer dravyaṃ saṃnikarṣeṇa dīpyate
tathā satsaṃnidhānena hīnavarṇo 'pi dīpyate
guṇā guṇajñeṣu guṇā bhavanti te nirguṇaṃ prāpya bhavanti doṣ
āsvādyatoyāḥ pravahanti nadyaḥ samudram āsādya bhavanty upey
tad eteṣām asmatputrāṇāṃ nītiśāstropadeśāya bhavantaḥ pramāṇ
saṃyojayati vidyaiva nīcagāpi naraṃ sarit
samudram iva durdharṣaṃ nṛpaṃ bhāgyam ataḥ param
vidyā dadāti vinayaṃ vinayād yāti pātratām
pātratvāt dhanam āpnoti dhanād dharmaṃ tataḥ sukham
vidyā śastraṃ ca śāstraṃ ca dve vidye pratipattaye
ādyā hāsyāya vṛddhatve dvitīyādriyate sadā
yan nave bhājane lagnaḥ saṃskāro nānyathā bhavet
kathāchalena bālānāṃ nītis tad iha kathyate
mitralābhaḥ suhṛdbhedo vigrahaḥ saṃdhir eva ca
pañcatantrāt tathānyasmād granthād ākṛṣya likhyate
śriyaḥ kurūṇām adhipasya pālanīṃ prajāsu vṛttiṃ yam ayuṅkta
sa varṇiliṅgī viditaḥ samāyayau yudhiṣṭhiraṃ dvaitavane vane
sakhīn iva prītiyujo 'nujīvinaḥ samānamānān suhṛdaś ca bandh
sa saṃtataṃ darśayate gatasmayaḥ kṛtādhipatyām iva sādhu ban
asaktam ārādhayato yathāyathaṃ vibhajya bhaktyā samapakṣapāt
guṇānurāgād iva sakhyam īyivān na bādhate 'sya trigaṇaḥ para
niratyayaṃ sāma na dānavarjitaṃ na bhūri dānaṃ virahayya sat
pravartate tasya viśeṣaśālinī guṇānurodhena vinā na satkriyā
vasūni vāñchan na vaśī na manyunā svadharma ity eva nivṛttak
gurūpadiṣṭena ripau sute 'pi vā nihanti daṇḍena sa dharmavip
vidhāya rakṣān paritaḥ paretarān aśaṅkitākāram upaiti śaṅkit
kriyāpavargeṣv anujīvisātkṛtāḥ kṛtajñatām asya vadanti sampa
anārataṃ tena padeṣu lambhitā vibhajya samyag viniyogasatkri
phalanty upāyāḥ paribṛṃhitāyatīr upetya saṃgharṣam ivārthasa
anekarājanyarathāśvasaṃkulaṃ tadīyam āsthānaniketanājiram
nayaty ayugmacchadagandhir ārdratāṃ bhṛśaṃ nṛpopāyanadantinā
sukhena labhyā dadhataḥ kṛṣīvalair akṛṣṭapacyā iva sasyasamp
vitanvati kṣemam adevamātṛkāś cirāya tasmin kuravaś cakāsati
mahaujaso mānadhanā dhanārcitā dhanurbhṛtaḥ saṃyati labdhakī
na saṃhatās tasya na bhedavṛttayaḥ priyāṇi vāñchanty asubhiḥ
udārakīrter udayaṃ dayāvataḥ praśāntabādhaṃ diśato 'bhirakṣa
svayaṃ pradugdhe 'sya guṇair upasnutā vasūpamānasya vasūni m
kṛtapraṇāmasya mahīṃ mahībhuje jitāṃ sapatnena nivedayiṣyata
na vivyathe tasya mano na hi priyaṃ pravaktum icchanti mṛṣā
mahībhujāṃ saccaritaiś caraiḥ kriyāḥ sa veda niḥśeṣam aśeṣit
mahodayais tasya hitānubandhibhiḥ pratīyate dhātur ivehitaṃ
na tena sajyaṃ kvacid udyataṃ dhanur na vā kṛtaṃ kopavijihma
guṇānurāgeṇa śirobhir uhyate narādhipair mālyam ivāsya śāsan
sa yauvarājye navayauvanoddhataṃ nidhāya duḥśāsanam iddhaśās
makheṣv akhinno 'numataḥ purodhasā dhinoti havyena hiraṇyare
pralīnabhūpālam api sthirāyati praśāsad āvāridhi maṇḍalaṃ bh
sa cintayaty eva bhiyas tvad eṣyatīr aho durantā balavadviro
kathāprasaṅgena janair udāhṛtād anusmṛtākhaṇḍalasūnuvikramaḥ
tavābhidhānād vyathate natānanaḥ sa duḥsahān mantrapadād ivo
tad āśu kartuṃ tvayi jihmam udyate vidhīyatāṃ tatra vidheyam
parapraṇītāni vacāṃsi cinvatāṃ pravṛttisārāḥ khalu mādṛśāṃ d
itīrayitvā giram āttasatkriye gate 'tha patyau vanasaṃnivāsi
praviśya kṛṣṇā sadanaṃ mahībhujā tad ācacakṣe 'nujasannidhau
niśamya siddhiṃ dviṣatām apākṛtīs tatas tatastyā viniyantum
nṛpasya manyuvyavasāyadīpinīr udājahāra drupadātmajā giraḥ
bhavādṛśeṣu pramadājanoditaṃ bhavaty adhikṣepa ivānuśāsanam
tathāpi vaktuṃ vyavasāyayanti māṃ nirastanārīsamayā durādhay
akhaṇḍam ākhaṇḍalatulyadhāmabhiś ciraṃ dhṛtā bhūpatibhiḥ sva
tvayā svahastena mahī madacyutā mataṅgajena srag ivāpavarjit
dviṣāṃ vighātāya vidhātum icchato rahasy anujñām adhigamya b
sa sauṣṭhavaudāryaviśeṣaśālinīṃ viniścitārthām iti vācam āda
vrajanti te mūḍhadhiyaḥ parābhavaṃ bhavanti māyāviṣu ye na m
praviśya hi ghnanti śaṭhās tathāvidhān asaṃvṛtāṅgān niśitā i
guṇānuraktām anuraktasādhanaḥ kulābhimānī kulajāṃ narādhipaḥ
parais tvadanyaḥ ka ivāpahārayen manoramām ātmavadhūm iva śr
bhavantam etarhi manasvigarhite vivartamānaṃ naradeva vartma
kathaṃ na manyur jvalayaty udīritaḥ śamītaruṃ śuṣkam ivāgnir
avandhyakopasya nihantur āpadāṃ bhavanti vaśyāḥ svayam eva d
amarṣaśūnyena janasya jantunā na jātahārdena na vidviṣādaraḥ
paribhramaṃl lohitacandanocitaḥ padātir antargiri reṇurūṣita
mahārathaḥ satyadhanasya mānasaṃ dunoti te kaccid ayaṃ vṛkod
vijitya yaḥ prājyam ayacchad uttarān kurūn akupyaṃ vasu vāsa
sa valkavāsāṃsi tavādhunāharan karoti manyuṃ na kathaṃ dhana
vanāntaśayyākaṭhinīkṛtākṛtī kacācitau viṣvag ivāgajau gajau
kathaṃ tvam etau dhṛtisaṃyamau yamau vilokayann utsahase na
imām ahaṃ veda na tāvakīṃ dhiyaṃ vicitrarūpāḥ khalu cittavṛt
vicintayantyā bhavadāpadaṃ parāṃ rujanti cetaḥ prasabhaṃ mam
purādhirūḍhaḥ śayanaṃ mahādhanaṃ vibodhyase yaḥ stutigītimaṅ
adabhradarbhām adhiśayya sa sthalīṃ jahāsi nidrām aśivaiḥ śi
puropanītaṃ nṛpa rāmaṇīyakaṃ dvijātiśeṣeṇa yad etad andhasā
tad adya te vanyaphalāśinaḥ paraṃ paraiti kārśyaṃ yaśasā sam
kriyāsu yuktair nṛpa cāracakṣuṣo na vañcanīyāḥ prabhavo 'nuj
ato 'rhasi kṣantum asādhu sādhu vā hitaṃ manohāri ca durlabh
anārataṃ yau maṇipīṭhaśāyināv arañjayad rājaśiraḥsrajāṃ raja
niṣīdatas tau caraṇau vaneṣu te mṛgadvijālūnaśikheṣu barhiṣā
dviṣannimittā yad iyaṃ daśā tataḥ samūlam unmūlayatīva me ma
parair aparyāsitavīryasampadāṃ parābhavo 'py utsava eva māni
vihāya śāntiṃ nṛpa dhāma tat punaḥ prasīda saṃdhehi vadhāya
vrajanti śatrūn avadhūya niḥspṛhāḥ śamena siddhiṃ munayo na
puraḥsarā dhāmavatāṃ yaśodhanāḥ suduḥsahaṃ prāpya nikāram īd
bhavādṛśāś ced adhikurvate parān nirāśrayā hanta hatā manasv
atha kṣamām eva nirastasādhanaś cirāya paryeṣi sukhasya sādh
vihāya lakṣmīpatilakṣma kārmukaṃ jaṭādharaḥ sañ juhudhīha pā
na samayaparirakṣaṇaṃ kṣamaṃ te nikṛtipareṣu pareṣu bhūridhā
ariṣu hi vijayārthinaḥ kṣitīśā vidadhati sopadhi saṃdhidūṣaṇ
vidhisamayaniyogād dīptisaṃhārajihmaṃ śithilabalam agādhe ma
riputimiram udasyodīyamānaṃ dinādau dinakṛtam iva lakṣmīs tv
sa kiṃsakhā sādhu na śāsti yo 'dhipaṃ hitān na yaḥ saṃśṛṇute
sadānukūleṣu hi kurvate ratiṃ nṛpeṣv amātyeṣu ca sarvasampad
nisargadurbodham abodhaviklavāḥ kva bhūpatīnāṃ caritaṃ kva j
tavānubhāvo 'yam abodhi yan mayā nigūḍhatattvaṃ nayavartma v
viśaṅkamāno bhavataḥ parābhavaṃ nṛpāsanastho 'pi vanādhivāsi
durodaracchadmajitāṃ samīhate nayena jetuṃ jagatīṃ suyodhana
tathāpi jihmaḥ sa bhavajjigīṣayā tanoti śubhraṃ guṇasampadā
samunnayan bhūtim anāryasaṃgamād varaṃ virodho 'pi samaṃ mah
kṛtāriṣaḍvargajayena mānavīm agamyarūpāṃ padavīṃ prapitsunā
vibhajya naktaṃdinam astatandriṇā vitanyate tena nayena paur
bṛhadaśva uvāca
āsīd rājā nalo nāma vīrasenasuto balī
upapanno guṇair iṣṭai rūpavān aśvakovidaḥ
damayantī tu rūpeṇa tejasā yaśasā śriyā
saubhāgyena ca lokeṣu yaśaḥ prāpa sumadhyamā
atha tāṃ vayasi prāpte dāsīnāṃ samalaṃkṛtām
śataṃ sakhīnāṃ ca tathā paryupāste śacīm iva
tatra sma bhrājate bhaimī sarvābharaṇabhūṣitā
sakhīmadhye 'navadyāṅgī vidyut saudāmanī yathā
atīva rūpasampannā śrīr ivāyatalocanā
na deveṣu na yakṣeṣu tādṛg rūpavatī kvacit
mānuṣeṣv api cānyeṣu dṛṣṭapūrvā na ca śrutā
cittapramāthinī bālā devānām api sundarī
nalaś ca naraśārdūlo rūpeṇāpratimo bhuvi
kandarpa iva rūpeṇa mūrtimān abhavat svayam
tasyāḥ samīpe tu nalaṃ praśaśaṃsuḥ kutūhalāt
naiṣadhasya samīpe tu damayantīṃ punaḥ punaḥ
tayor adṛṣṭakāmo 'bhūc chṛṇvatoḥ satataṃ guṇān
anyonyaṃ prati kaunteya sa vyavardhata hṛcchayaḥ
aśaknuvan nalaḥ kāmaṃ tadā dhārayituṃ hṛdā
antaḥpurasamīpasthe vana āste rahogataḥ
sa dadarśa tadā haṃsāñ jātarūpaparicchadān
vane vicaratāṃ teṣām ekaṃ jagrāha pakṣiṇam
tato 'ntarikṣago vācaṃ vyājahāra tadā nalam
na hantavyo 'smi te rājan kariṣyāmi hi te priyam
atiṣṭhan manujendrāṇāṃ mūrdhni devapatir yathā
upary upari sarveṣām āditya iva tejasā
damayantīsakāśe tvāṃ kathayiṣyāmi naiṣadha
yathā tvadanyaṃ puruṣaṃ na sā maṃsyati karhicit
evam uktas tato haṃsam utsasarja mahīpatiḥ
te tu haṃsāḥ samutpatya vidarbhān agamaṃs tataḥ
vidarbhanagarīṃ gatvā damayantyās tadāntike
nipetus te garutmantaḥ sā dadarśātha tān khagān
sā tān adbhutarūpān vai dṛṣṭvā sakhīgaṇāvṛtā
hṛṣṭā grahītuṃ khagamāṃs tvaramāṇopacakrame
atha haṃsā visasṛpuḥ sarvataḥ pramadāvane
ekaikaśas tataḥ kanyās tān haṃsān samupādravan
damayantī tu yaṃ haṃsaṃ samupādhāvad antike
sa mānuṣīṃ giraṃ kṛtvā damayantīm athābravīt
damayanti nalo nāma niṣadheṣu mahīpatiḥ
aśvinoḥ sadṛśo rūpe na samās tasya mānuṣāḥ
tasya vai yadi bhāryā tvaṃ bhavethā varavarṇini
saphalaṃ te bhavej janma rūpaṃ cedaṃ sumadhyame
vayaṃ hi devagandharvamanuṣyoragarākṣasān
dṛṣṭavanto na cāsmābhir dṛṣṭapūrvas tathāvidhaḥ
tvaṃ cāpi ratnaṃ nārīṇāṃ nareṣu ca nalo varaḥ
viśiṣṭāyā viśiṣṭena saṃgamo guṇavān bhavet
brahmaṇyo vedavic chūro niṣadheṣu mahīpatiḥ
akṣapriyaḥ satyavādī mahān akṣauhiṇīpatiḥ
evam uktā tu haṃsena damayantī viśāṃ pate
abravīt tatra taṃ haṃsaṃ tam apy evaṃ nalaṃ vada
tathety uktvāṇḍajaḥ kanyāṃ vaidarbhasya viśāṃ pate
punar āgamya niṣadhān nale sarvaṃ nyavedayat
īpsito varanārīṇām udāraḥ saṃyatendriyaḥ
rakṣitā dhanvināṃ śreṣṭhaḥ sākṣād iva manuḥ svayam
tathaivāsīd vidarbheṣu bhīmo bhīmaparākramaḥ
śūraḥ sarvaguṇair yuktaḥ prajākāmaḥ sa cāprajaḥ
sa prajārthe paraṃ yatnam akarot susamāhitaḥ
tam abhyagacchad brahmarṣir damano nāma bhārata
taṃ sa bhīmaḥ prajākāmas toṣayāmāsa dharmavit
mahiṣyā saha rājendra satkāreṇa suvarcasam
tasmai prasanno damanaḥ sabhāryāya varaṃ dadau
kanyāratnaṃ kumārāṃś ca trīn udārān mahāyaśāḥ
damayantīṃ damaṃ dāntaṃ damanaṃ ca suvarcasam
upapannān guṇaiḥ sarvair bhīmān bhīmaparākramān
bṛhadaśva uvāca
damayantī tu tacchrutvā vaco haṃsasya bhārata
tadā prabhṛti na svasthā nalaṃ prati babhūva sā
hastyaśvarathaghoṣeṇa nādayanto vasuṃdharām
vicitramālyābharaṇair balair dṛśyaiḥ svalaṃkṛtaiḥ
etasminn eva kāle tu purāṇāvṛṣisattamau
aṭamānau mahātmānāvindralokam ito gatau
nāradaḥ parvataś caiva mahātmānau mahāvratau
devarājasya bhavanaṃ viviśate supūjitau
tāvarcitvā sahasrākṣas tataḥ kuśalam avyayam
papracchānāmayaṃ cāpi tayoḥ sarvagataṃ vibhuḥ
nārada uvāca
āvayoḥ kuśalaṃ deva sarvatragatam īśvara
loke ca maghavan kṛtsne nṛpāḥ kuśalino vibho
bṛhadaśva uvāca
nāradasya vacaḥ śrutvā papraccha balavṛtrahā
dharmajñāḥ pṛthivīpālās tyaktajīvitayodhinaḥ
śastreṇa nidhanaṃ kāle ye gacchantyaparāṅmukhāḥ
ayaṃ loko 'kṣayas teṣāṃ yathaiva mama kāmadhuk
kva nu te kṣatriyāḥ śūrā na hi paśyāmi tān aham
āgacchato mahīpālān atithīn dayitān mama
evam uktas tu śakreṇa nāradaḥ pratyabhāṣata
śṛṇu me bhagavan yena na dṛśyante mahīkṣitaḥ
vidarbharājaduhitā damayantīti viśrutā
rūpeṇa samatikrāntā pṛthivyāṃ sarvayoṣitaḥ
tataś cintāparā dīnā vivarṇavadanā kṛśā
babhūva damayantī tu niḥśvāsaparamā tadā
tasyāḥ svayaṃvaraḥ śakra bhavitā nacirād iva
tatra gacchanti rājāno rājaputrāś ca sarvaśaḥ
tāṃ ratnabhūtāṃ lokasya prārthayanto mahīkṣitaḥ
kāṅkṣanti sma viśeṣeṇa balavṛtraniṣūdana
etasmin kathyamāne tu lokapālāś ca sāgnikāḥ
ājagmur devarājasya samīpam amarottamāḥ
tatastacchuśruvuḥ sarve nāradasya vaco mahat
śrutvā caivābruvan hṛṣṭā gacchāmo vayam apyuta
tataḥ sarve mahārāja sagaṇāḥ sahavāhanāḥ
vidarbhān abhito jagmur yatra sarve mahīkṣitaḥ
nalo 'pi rājā kaunteya śrutvā rājñāṃ samāgamam
abhyagacchad adīnātmā damayantīm anuvrataḥ
atha devāḥ pathi nalaṃ dadṛśur bhūtale sthitam
sākṣād iva sthitaṃ mūrtyā manmathaṃ rūpasampadā
taṃ dṛṣṭvā lokapālās te bhrājamānaṃ yathā ravim
tasthur vigatasaṃkalpā vismitā rūpasampadā
tato 'ntarikṣe viṣṭabhya vimānāni divaukasaḥ
abruvan naiṣadhaṃ rājann avatīrya nabhastalāt
bho bho naiṣadha rājendra nala satyavrato bhavān
asmākaṃ kuru sāhāyyaṃ dūto bhava narottama
ūrdhvadṛṣṭir dhyānaparā babhūvonmattadarśanā
na śayyāsanabhogeṣu ratiṃ vindati karhicit
na naktaṃ na divā śete hā heti vadatī muhuḥ
tām asvasthāṃ tadākārāṃ sakhyas tā jajñur iṅgitaiḥ
tato vidarbhapataye damayantyāḥ sakhīgaṇaḥ
nyavedayata na svasthāṃ damayantīṃ nareśvara
tacchrutvā nṛpatir bhīmo damayantīsakhīgaṇāt
cintayāmāsa tat kāryaṃ sumahat svāṃ sutāṃ prati
sa samīkṣya mahīpālaḥ svāṃ sutāṃ prāptayauvanām
apaśyad ātmanaḥ kāryaṃ damayantyāḥ svayaṃvaram
sa saṃnipātayāmāsa mahīpālān viśāṃ pate
anubhūyatām ayaṃ vīrāḥ svayaṃvara iti prabho
śrutvā tu pārthivāḥ sarve damayantyāḥ svayaṃvaram
abhijagmus tadā bhīmaṃ rājāno bhīmaśāsanāt
bṛhadaśva uvāca
tebhyaḥ pratijñāya nalaḥ kariṣya iti bhārata
athainān paripapraccha kṛtāñjalir avasthitaḥ
pravekṣyasīti taṃ śakraḥ punar evābhyabhāṣata
jagāma sa tathetyuktvā damayantyā niveśanam
dadarśa tatra vaidarbhīṃ sakhīgaṇasamāvṛtām
dedīpyamānāṃ vapuṣā śriyā ca varavarṇinīm
atīva sukumārāṅgīṃ tanumadhyāṃ sulocanām
ākṣipantīm iva ca bhāḥ śaśinaḥ svena tejasā
tasya dṛṣṭvaiva vavṛdhe kāmas tāṃ cāruhāsinīm
satyaṃ cikīrṣamāṇas tu dhārayāmāsa hṛcchayam
tatas tā naiṣadhaṃ dṛṣṭvā saṃbhrāntāḥ paramāṅganāḥ
āsanebhyaḥ samutpetus tejasā tasya dharṣitāḥ
praśaśaṃsuś ca suprītā nalaṃ tā vismayānvitāḥ
na cainam abhyabhāṣanta manobhistvabhyacintayan
aho rūpam aho kāntir aho dhairyaṃ mahātmanaḥ
ko 'yaṃ devo nu yakṣo nu gandharvo nu bhaviṣyati
na tvenaṃ śaknuvanti sma vyāhartum api kiṃcana
tejasā dharṣitāḥ sarvā lajjāvatyo varāṅganāḥ
athainaṃ smayamāneva smitapūrvābhibhāṣiṇī
damayantī nalaṃ vīram abhyabhāṣata vismitā
kastvaṃ sarvānavadyāṅga mama hṛcchayavardhana
prāpto 'syamaravad vīra jñātum icchāmi te 'nagha
ke vai bhavantaḥ kaścāsau yasyāhaṃ dūta īpsitaḥ
kiṃ ca tatra mayā kāryaṃ kathayadhvaṃ yathātatham
katham āgamanaṃ ceha kathaṃ cāsi na lakṣitaḥ
surakṣitaṃ hi me veśma rājā caivograśāsanaḥ
evam uktastu vaidarbhyā nalas tāṃ pratyuvāca ha
nalaṃ māṃ viddhi kalyāṇi devadūtam ihāgatam
devāstvāṃ prāptum icchanti śakro 'gnir varuṇo yamaḥ
teṣām anyatamaṃ devaṃ patiṃ varaya śobhane
teṣām eva prabhāvena praviṣṭo 'ham alakṣitaḥ
praviśantaṃ hi māṃ kaścinnāpaśyan nāpyavārayat
etadartham ahaṃ bhadre preṣitaḥ surasattamaiḥ
etacchrutvā śubhe buddhiṃ prakuruṣva yathecchasi
evam ukte naiṣadhena maghavān pratyabhāṣata
amarān vai nibodhāsmān damayantyartham āgatān
aham indro 'yam agniś ca tathaivāyam apāmpatiḥ
śarīrāntakaro nṝṇāṃ yamo 'yam api pārthiva
sa vai tvam āgatān asmān damayantyai nivedaya
lokapālāḥ sahendrāstvāṃ samāyānti didṛkṣavaḥ
prāptum icchanti devās tvāṃ śakro 'gnir varuṇo yamaḥ
teṣām anyatamaṃ devaṃ patitve varayasva ha
evam uktaḥ sa śakreṇa nalaḥ prāñjalir abravīt
ekārthasamavetaṃ māṃ na preṣayitum arhatha
devā ūcuḥ
kariṣya iti saṃśrutya pūrvam asmāsu naiṣadha
na kariṣyasi kasmāt tvaṃ vraja naiṣadha māciram
bṛhadaśva uvāca
evam uktaḥ sa devais tair naiṣadhaḥ punar abravīt
surakṣitāni veśmāni praveṣṭuṃ katham utsahe
dhṛtarāṣṭra uvāca
saṃjaya uvāca
paśyaitāṃ pāṇḍu-putrāṇām ācārya mahatīṃ camūm
atra śūrā maheṣv-āsā bhīmārjuna-samā yudhi
dhṛṣṭa-ketuś cekitānaḥ kāśi-rājaś ca vīryavān
yudhā-manyuś ca vikrānta uttamaujāś ca vīryavān
asmākaṃ tu viśiṣṭā ye tān nibodha dvijottama
bhavān bhīṣmaś ca karṇaś ca kṛpaś ca samitiṃ-jayaḥ
anye ca bahavaḥ śūrā mad-arthe tyakta-jīvitāḥ
aparyāptaṃ tad asmākaṃ balaṃ bhīṣmābhirakṣitam
ayaneṣu ca sarveṣu yathā bhāgam avasthitāḥ
tasya saṃjanayan harṣaṃ kuru-vṛddhaḥ pitā-mahaḥ
tataḥ śaṅkhāś ca bheryaś ca paṇavānaka-gomukhāḥ
tataḥ śvetair hayair yukte mahati syandane sthitau
pāñcajanyaṃ hṛṣīkeśo devadattaṃ dhanaṃjayaḥ
anantavijayaṃ rājā kuntī-putro yudhiṣṭhiraḥ
kāśyaś ca parameṣv-āsaḥ śikhaṇḍī ca mahā-rathaḥ
drupado draupadeyāś ca sarvaśaḥ pṛthivīpate
sa ghoṣo dhārtarāṣṭrāṇāṃ hṛdayāni vyadārayat
atha vyavasthitān dṛṣṭvā dhārtarāṣṭrān kapi-dhvajaḥ
arjuna uvāca
yāvad etān nirīkṣe ‘haṃ yoddhu-kāmān avasthitān
yotsyamānān avekṣe ‘haṃ ya ete ‘tra samāgatāḥ
saṃjaya uvāca
bhīṣma-droṇa-pramukhataḥ sarveṣāṃ ca mahīkṣitām
tatrāpaśyat sthitān pārthaḥ pitṝn atha pitā-mahān
śvaśurān suhṛdaś caiva senayor ubhayor api
arjuna uvāca
sīdanti mama gātrāṇi mukhaṃ ca pariśuṣyati
gāṇḍīvaṃ sraṃsate hastāt tvak caiva paridahyate
nimittāni ca paśyāmi viparītāni keśava
na kāṅkṣe vijayaṃ kṛṣṇa na ca rājyaṃ sukhāni ca
yeṣām arthe kāṅkṣitaṃ no rājyaṃ bhogāḥ sukhāni ca
ācāryāḥ pitaraḥ putrās tathaiva ca pitāmahāḥ
etān na hantum icchāmi ghnato ‘pi madhusūdana
nihatya dhārtarāṣṭrān naḥ kā prītiḥ syāj janārdana
tasmān nārhā vayaṃ hantuṃ dhārtarāṣṭrān sa-bāndhavān
yady apy ete na paśyanti lobhopahata-cetasaḥ
kathaṃ na jñeyam asmābhiḥ pāpād asmān nivartitum
kula-kṣaye praṇaśyanti kula-dharmāḥ sanātanāḥ
adharmābhibhavāt kṛṣṇa praduṣyanti kula-striyaḥ
saṃkaro narakāyaiva kula-ghnānāṃ kulasya ca
doṣair etaiḥ kula-ghnānāṃ varṇa-saṃkara-kārakaiḥ
utsanna-kula-dharmāṇāṃ manuṣyāṇāṃ janārdana
aho bata mahat pāpaṃ kartuṃ vyavasitā vayam
yadi mām apratī-kāram aśastraṃ śastra-pāṇayaḥ
saṃjaya uvāca
śrī-bhagavān uvāca
na me viduḥ sura-gaṇāḥ prabhavaṃ na maha-rṣayaḥ
yo mām ajam anādiṃ ca vetti loka-maheśvaram
buddhir jñānam asaṃmohaḥ kṣamā satyaṃ damaḥ śamaḥ
ahiṃsā samatā tuṣṭis tapo dānaṃ yaśo ‘yaśaḥ
maha-rṣayaḥ sapta pūrve catvāro manavas tathā
etāṃ vibhūtiṃ yogaṃ ca mama yo vetti tattvataḥ
ahaṃ sarvasya prabhavo mattaḥ sarvaṃ pravartate
mac-cittā mad-gata-prāṇā bodhayantaḥ paras-param
teṣāṃ satata-yuktānāṃ bhajatāṃ prīti-pūrvakam
teṣām evānukampārtham aham ajñāna-jaṃ tamaḥ
arjuna uvāca
āhus tvām ṛṣayaḥ sarve deva-rṣir nāradas tathā
sarvam etad ṛtaṃ manye yan māṃ vadasi keśava
svayam evātmanātmānaṃ vettha tvaṃ puruṣottama
vaktum arhasy aśeṣeṇa divyā hy ātma-vibhūtayaḥ
kathaṃ vidyām ahaṃ yogiṃs tvāṃ sadā paricintayan
vistareṇātmano yogaṃ vibhūtiṃ ca janārdana
śrī-bhagavān uvāca
aham ātmā guḍākeśa sarva-bhūtāśaya-sthitaḥ
ādityānām ahaṃ viṣṇur jyotiṣāṃ ravir aṃśumān
vedānāṃ sāma-vedo ‘smi devānām asmi vāsavaḥ
rudrāṇāṃ śaṃkaraś cāsmi vitteśo yakṣa-rakṣasām
purodhasāṃ ca mukhyaṃ māṃ viddhi pārtha bṛhaspatim
maha-rṣīṇāṃ bhṛgur ahaṃ girām asmy ekam akṣaram
aśvatthaḥ sarva-vṛkṣāṇāṃ deva-rṣīṇāṃ ca nāradaḥ
uccaiḥśravasam aśvānāṃ viddhi mām amṛtodbhavam
āyudhānām ahaṃ vajraṃ dhenūnām asmi kāma-dhuk
anantaś cāsmi nāgānāṃ varuṇo yādasām aham
prahlādaś cāsmi daityānāṃ kālaḥ kalayatām aham
pavanaḥ pavatām asmi rāmaḥ śastra-bhṛtām aham
sargāṇām ādir antaś ca madhyaṃ caivāham arjuna
akṣarāṇām akāro ‘smi dvaṃdvaḥ sāmāsikasya ca
mṛtyuḥ sarva-haraś cāham udbhavaś ca bhaviṣyatām
bṛhat-sāma tathā sāmnāṃ gāyatrī chandasām aham
dyūtaṃ chalayatām asmi tejas tejasvinām aham
vṛṣṇīnāṃ vāsudevo ‘smi pāṇḍavānāṃ dhanaṃjayaḥ
daṇḍo damayatām asmi nītir asmi jigīṣatām
yac cāpi sarva-bhūtānāṃ bījaṃ tad aham arjuna
nānto ‘sti mama divyānāṃ vibhūtīnāṃ paraṃtapa
yad yad vibhūtimat sattvaṃ śrīmad ūrjitam eva vā
atha vā bahunaitena kiṃ jñātena tavārjuna
arjuna uvāca
bhavāpyayau hi bhūtānāṃ śrutau vistaraśo mayā
evam etad yathāttha tvam ātmānaṃ parameśvara
manyase yadi tac chakyaṃ mayā draṣṭum iti prabho
śrī-bhagavān uvāca
paśyādityān vasūn rudrān aśvinau marutas tathā
ihaika-sthaṃ jagat kṛtsnaṃ paśyādya sa-carācaram
na tu māṃ śakyase draṣṭum anenaiva sva-cakṣuṣā
saṃjaya uvāca
aneka-vaktra-nayanam anekādbhuta-darśanam
divya-mālyāmbara-dharaṃ divya-gandhānulepanam
divi sūrya-sahasrasya bhaved yuga-pad utthitā
tatraika-sthaṃ jagat kṛtsnaṃ pravibhaktam aneka-dhā
tataḥ sa vismayāviṣṭo hṛṣṭa-romā dhanaṃjayaḥ
arjuna uvāca
aneka-bāhūdara-vaktra-netraṃ
kirīṭinaṃ gadinaṃ cakriṇaṃ ca
tvam akṣaraṃ paramaṃ veditavyaṃ
anādi-madhyāntam ananta-vīryam
dyāvā-pṛthivyor idam antaraṃ hi
amī hi tvā sura-saṃghā viśanti
rudrādityā vasavo ye ca sādhyā
rūpaṃ mahat te bahu-vaktra-netraṃ
nabhaḥ-spṛśaṃ dīptam aneka-varṇaṃ
daṃṣṭrā-karālāni ca te mukhāni
amī ca tvāṃ dhṛtarāṣṭrasya putrāḥ
vaktrāṇi te tvaramāṇā viśanti
yathā nadīnāṃ bahavo ‘mbu-vegāḥ
yathā pradīptaṃ jvalanaṃ pataṃgā
lelihyase grasamānaḥ samantāl
ākhyāhi me ko bhavān ugra-rūpo
śrī-bhagavān uvāca
tasmāt tvam uttiṣṭha yaśo labhasva
droṇaṃ ca bhīṣmaṃ ca jayadrathaṃ ca
saṃjaya uvāca
arjuna uvāca
kasmāc ca te na nameran mahātman
tvam ādi-devaḥ puruṣaḥ purāṇas
vāyur yamo ‘gnir varuṇaḥ śaśāṅkaḥ
namaḥ purastād atha pṛṣṭhatas te
sakheti matvā prasabhaṃ yad uktaṃ
yac cāvahāsārtham asat-kṛto ‘si
pitāsi lokasya carācarasya
tasmāt praṇamya praṇidhāya kāyaṃ
adṛṣṭa-pūrvaṃ hṛṣito ‘smi dṛṣṭvā
kirīṭinaṃ gadinaṃ cakra-hastam
śrī-bhagavān uvāca
na veda-yajñādhyayanair na dānair
mā te vyathā mā ca vimūḍha-bhāvo
saṃjaya uvāca
arjuna uvāca
śrī-bhagavān uvāca
nāhaṃ vedair na tapasā na dānena na cejyayā
bhaktyā tv ananyayā śakya aham evaṃ-vidho ‘rjuna
mat-karma-kṛn mat-paramo mad-bhaktaḥ saṅga-varjitaḥ
arjuna uvāca
śrī-bhagavān uvāca
ye tv akṣaram anirdeśyam avyaktaṃ paryupāsate
saṃniyamyendriya-grāmaṃ sarvatra sama-buddhayaḥ
kleśo ‘dhikataras teṣām avyaktāsakta-cetasām
ye tu sarvāṇi karmāṇi mayi saṃnyasya mat-parāḥ
teṣām ahaṃ samuddhartā mṛtyu-saṃsāra-sāgarāt
mayy eva mana ādhatsva mayi buddhiṃ niveśaya
atha cittaṃ samādhātuṃ na śaknoṣi mayi sthiram
abhyāse ‘py asamartho ‘si mat-karma-paramo bhava
athaitad apy aśakto ‘si kartuṃ mad-yogam āśritaḥ
śreyo hi jñānam abhyāsāj jñānād dhyānaṃ viśiṣyate
adveṣṭā sarva-bhūtānāṃ maitraḥ karuṇa eva ca
saṃtuṣṭaḥ satataṃ yogī yatātmā dṛḍha-niścayaḥ
yasmān nodvijate loko lokān nodvijate ca yaḥ
anapekṣaḥ śucir dakṣa udāsīno gata-vyathaḥ
yo na hṛṣyati na dveṣṭi na śocati na kāṅkṣati
samaḥ śatrau ca mitre ca tathā mānāvamānayoḥ
tulya-nindā-stutir maunī saṃtuṣṭo yena kena-cit
ye tu dharmyāmṛtam idaṃ yathoktaṃ paryupāsate
arjuna uvāca
śrī-bhagavān uvāca
kṣetra-jñaṃ cāpi māṃ viddhi sarva-kṣetreṣu bhārata
tat kṣetraṃ yac ca yādṛk ca yad-vikāri yataś ca yat
ṛṣibhir bahudhā gītaṃ chandobhir vividhaiḥ pṛthak
mahā-bhūtāny ahaṃ-kāro buddhir avyaktam eva ca
icchā dveṣaḥ sukhaṃ duḥkhaṃ saṃghātaś cetanā dhṛtiḥ
amānitvam adambhitvam ahiṃsā kṣāntir ārjavam
indriyārtheṣu vairāgyam anahaṃ-kāra eva ca
asaktir anabhiṣvaṅgaḥ putra-dāra-gṛhādiṣu
mayi cānanya-yogena bhaktir avyabhicāriṇī
adhy-ātma-jñāna-nityatvaṃ tattva-jñānārtha-darśanam
jñeyaṃ yat tat pravakṣyāmi yaj jñātvāmṛtam aśnute
sarvataḥ pāṇi-pādaṃ tat sarvato ‘kṣi-śiro-mukham
sarvendriya-guṇābhāsaṃ sarvendriya-vivarjitam
bahir antaś ca bhūtānām acaraṃ caram eva ca
avibhaktaṃ ca bhūteṣu vibhaktam iva ca sthitam
jyotiṣām api taj jyotis tamasaḥ param ucyate
iti kṣetraṃ tathā jñānaṃ jñeyaṃ coktaṃ samāsataḥ
prakṛtiṃ puruṣaṃ caiva viddhy anādī ubhāv api
kārya-kāraṇa-kartṛtve hetuḥ prakṛtir ucyate
puruṣaḥ prakṛti-stho hi bhuṅkte prakṛti-jān guṇān
upadraṣṭānumantā ca bhartā bhoktā maheśvaraḥ
ya evaṃ vetti puruṣaṃ prakṛtiṃ ca guṇaiḥ saha
dhyānenātmani paśyanti ke-cid ātmānam ātmanā
anye tv evam ajānantaḥ śrutvānyebhya upāsate
yāvat saṃjāyate kiṃ-cit sattvaṃ sthāvara-jaṅgamam
samaṃ sarveṣu bhūteṣu tiṣṭhantaṃ parameśvaram
samaṃ paśyan hi sarvatra samavasthitam īśvaram
prakṛtyaiva ca karmāṇi kriyamāṇāni sarvaśaḥ
yadā bhūta-pṛthag-bhāvam eka-stham anupaśyati
anāditvān nirguṇatvāt paramātmāyam avyayaḥ
yathā sarva-gataṃ saukṣmyād ākāśaṃ nopalipyate
yathā prakāśayaty ekaḥ kṛtsnaṃ lokam imaṃ raviḥ
kṣetra-kṣetra-jñayor evam antaraṃ jñāna-cakṣuṣā
śrī-bhagavān uvāca
idaṃ jñānam upāśritya mama sādharmyam āgatāḥ
mama yonir mahad brahma tasmin garbhaṃ dadhāmy aham
sarva-yoniṣu kaunteya mūrtayaḥ saṃbhavanti yāḥ
sattvaṃ rajas tama iti guṇāḥ prakṛti-saṃbhavāḥ
tatra sattvaṃ nirmalatvāt prakāśakam anāmayam
rajo rāgātmakaṃ viddhi tṛṣṇā-saṅga-samudbhavam
tamas tv ajñāna-jaṃ viddhi mohanaṃ sarva-dehinām
sattvaṃ sukhe sañjayati rajaḥ karmaṇi bhārata
rajas tamaś cābhibhūya sattvaṃ bhavati bhārata
sarva-dvāreṣu dehe ‘smin prakāśa upajāyate
lobhaḥ pravṛttir ārambhaḥ karmaṇām aśamaḥ spṛhā
aprakāśo ‘pravṛttiś ca pramādo moha eva ca
yadā sattve pravṛddhe tu pralayaṃ yāti deha-bhṛt
rajasi pralayaṃ gatvā karma-saṅgiṣu jāyate
karmaṇaḥ sukṛtasyāhuḥ sāttvikaṃ nirmalaṃ phalam
sattvāt saṃjāyate jñānaṃ rajaso lobha eva ca
ūrdhvaṃ gacchanti sattva-sthā madhye tiṣṭhanti rājasāḥ
nānyaṃ guṇebhyaḥ kartāraṃ yadā draṣṭānupaśyati
guṇān etān atītya trīn dehī deha-samudbhavān
arjuna uvāca
śrī-bhagavān uvāca
udāsīnavad āsīno guṇair yo na vicālyate
sama-duḥkha-sukhaḥ svasthaḥ sama-loṣṭāśma-kāñcanaḥ
mānāvamānayos tulyas tulyo mitrāri-pakṣayoḥ
māṃ ca yo ‘vyabhicāreṇa bhakti-yogena sevate
brahmaṇo hi pratiṣṭhāham amṛtasyāvyayasya ca
śrī-bhagavān uvāca
adhaś cordhvaṃ prasṛtās tasya śākhā
na rūpam asyeha tathopalabhyate
tataḥ padaṃ tat parimārgitavyaṃ
nirmāna-mohā jita-saṅga-doṣā
na tad bhāsayate sūryo na śaśāṅko na pāvakaḥ
mamaivāṃśo jīva-loke jīva-bhūtaḥ sanātanaḥ
śarīraṃ yad avāpnoti yac cāpy utkrāmatīśvaraḥ
śrotraṃ cakṣuḥ sparśanaṃ ca rasanaṃ ghrāṇam eva ca
utkrāmantaṃ sthitaṃ vāpi bhuñjānaṃ vā guṇānvitam
yatanto yoginaś cainaṃ paśyanty ātmany avasthitam
yad āditya-gataṃ tejo jagad bhāsayate ‘khilam
gām āviśya ca bhūtāni dhārayāmy aham ojasā
ahaṃ vaiśvānaro bhūtvā prāṇināṃ deham āśritaḥ
sarvasya cāhaṃ hṛdi saṃniviṣṭo
dvāv imau puruṣau loke kṣaraś cākṣara eva ca
uttamaḥ puruṣas tv anyaḥ paramātmety udāhṛtaḥ
yasmāt kṣaram atīto ‘ham akṣarād api cottamaḥ
yo mām evam asaṃmūḍho jānāti puruṣottamam
iti guhyatamaṃ śāstram idam uktaṃ mayānagha
śrī-bhagavān uvāca
ahiṃsā satyam akrodhas tyāgaḥ śāntir apaiśunam
tejaḥ kṣamā dhṛtiḥ śaucam adroho nāti-mānitā
dambho darpo ‘ti-mānaś ca krodhaḥ pāruṣyam eva ca
daivī saṃpad vimokṣāya nibandhāyāsurī matā
dvau bhūta-sargau loke ‘smin daiva āsura eva ca
pravṛttiṃ ca nivṛttiṃ ca janā na vidur āsurāḥ
asatyam apratiṣṭhaṃ te jagad āhur anīśvaram
etāṃ dṛṣṭim avaṣṭabhya naṣṭātmāno ‘lpa-buddhayaḥ
kāmam āśritya duṣpūraṃ dambha-māna-madānvitāḥ
cintām aparimeyāṃ ca pralayāntām upāśritāḥ
āśā-pāśa-śatair baddhāḥ kāma-krodha-parāyaṇāḥ
idam adya mayā labdham idaṃ prāpsye mano-ratham
asau mayā hataḥ śatrur haniṣye cāparān api
āḍhyo ‘bhijanavān asmi ko ‘nyo ‘sti sadṛśo mayā
aneka-citta-vibhrāntā moha-jāla-samāvṛtāḥ
ātma-saṃbhāvitāḥ stabdhā dhana-māna-madānvitāḥ
ahaṃ-kāraṃ balaṃ darpaṃ kāmaṃ krodhaṃ ca saṃśritāḥ
tān ahaṃ dviṣataḥ krūrān saṃsāreṣu narādhamān
āsurīṃ yonim āpannā mūḍhā janmani janmani
tri-vidhaṃ narakasyedaṃ dvāraṃ nāśanam ātmanaḥ
etair vimuktaḥ kaunteya tamo-dvārais tribhir naraḥ
yaḥ śāstra-vidhim utsṛjya vartate kāma-kārataḥ
tasmāc chāstraṃ pramāṇaṃ te kāryākārya-vyavasthitau
arjuna uvāca
śrī-bhagavān uvāca
sattvānurūpā sarvasya śraddhā bhavati bhārata
yajante sāttvikā devān yakṣa-rakṣāṃsi rājasāḥ
aśāstra-vihitaṃ ghoraṃ tapyante ye tapo janāḥ
karśayantaḥ śarīra-sthaṃ bhūta-grāmam acetasaḥ
āhāras tv api sarvasya tri-vidho bhavati priyaḥ
āyuḥ-sattva-balārogya-sukha-prīti-vivardhanāḥ
kaṭv-amla-lavaṇāty-uṣṇa-tīkṣṇa-rūkṣa-vidāhinaḥ
yāta-yāmaṃ gata-rasaṃ pūti paryuṣitaṃ ca yat
aphalākāṅkṣibhir yajño vidhi-dṛṣṭo ya ijyate
abhisaṃdhāya tu phalaṃ dambhārtham api caiva yat
vidhi-hīnam asṛṣṭānnaṃ mantra-hīnam adakṣiṇam
deva-dvija-guru-prājña-pūjanaṃ śaucam ārjavam
anudvega-karaṃ vākyaṃ satyaṃ priya-hitaṃ ca yat
manaḥ-prasādaḥ saumyatvaṃ maunam ātma-vinigrahaḥ
śraddhayā parayā taptaṃ tapas tat tri-vidhaṃ naraiḥ
sat-kāra-māna-pūjārthaṃ tapo dambhena caiva yat
mūḍha-grāheṇātmano yat pīḍayā kriyate tapaḥ
dātavyam iti yad dānaṃ dīyate ‘nupakāriṇe
yat tu praty-upakārārthaṃ phalam uddiśya vā punaḥ
adeśa-kāle yad dānam apātrebhyaś ca dīyate
oṃ tat sad iti nirdeśo brahmaṇas tri-vidhaḥ smṛtaḥ
tasmād om ity udāhṛtya yajña-dāna-tapaḥ-kriyāḥ
tad ity anabhisaṃdhāya phalaṃ yajña-tapaḥ-kriyāḥ
sad-bhāve sādhu-bhāve ca sad ity etat prayujyate
yajñe tapasi dāne ca sthitiḥ sad iti cocyate
aśraddhayā hutaṃ dattaṃ tapas taptaṃ kṛtaṃ ca yat
arjuna uvāca
śrī-bhagavān uvāca
tyājyaṃ doṣa-vad ity eke karma prāhur manīṣiṇaḥ
niścayaṃ śṛṇu me tatra tyāge bharata-sattama
yajña-dāna-tapaḥ-karma na tyājyaṃ kāryam eva tat
etāny api tu karmāṇi saṅgaṃ tyaktvā phalāni ca
niyatasya tu saṃnyāsaḥ karmaṇo nopapadyate
duḥkham ity eva yat karma kāya-kleśa-bhayāt tyajet
kāryam ity eva yat karma niyataṃ kriyate ‘rjuna
na dveṣṭy akuśalaṃ karma kuśale nānuṣajjate
na hi deha-bhṛtā śakyaṃ tyaktuṃ karmāṇy aśeṣataḥ
aniṣṭam iṣṭaṃ miśraṃ ca tri-vidhaṃ karmaṇaḥ phalam
pañcaitāni mahābāho kāraṇāni nibodha me
adhiṣṭhānaṃ tathā kartā karaṇaṃ ca pṛthag-vidham
śarīra-vāṅ-manobhir yat karma prārabhate naraḥ
tatraivaṃ sati kartāram ātmānaṃ kevalaṃ tu yaḥ
yasya nāhaṃ-kṛto bhāvo buddhir yasya na lipyate
jñānaṃ jñeyaṃ parijñātā tri-vidhā karma-codanā
jñānaṃ karma ca kartā ca tri-dhaiva guṇa-bhedataḥ
sarva-bhūteṣu yenaikaṃ bhāvam avyayam īkṣate
pṛthaktvena tu yaj jñānaṃ nānā-bhāvān pṛthag-vidhān
yat tu kṛtsnavad ekasmin kārye saktam ahaitukam
niyataṃ saṅga-rahitam arāga-dveṣataḥ kṛtam
yat tu kāmepsunā karma sāhaṃ-kāreṇa vā punaḥ
anubandhaṃ kṣayaṃ hiṃsām anapekṣya ca pauruṣam
mukta-saṅgo ‘nahaṃ-vādī dhṛty-utsāha-samanvitaḥ
rāgī karma-phala-prepsur lubdho hiṃsātmako ‘śuciḥ
ayuktaḥ prākṛtaḥ stabdhaḥ śaṭho naikṛtiko ‘lasaḥ
buddher bhedaṃ dhṛteś caiva guṇatas tri-vidhaṃ śṛṇu
pravṛttiṃ ca nivṛttiṃ ca kāryākārye bhayābhaye
yayā dharmam adharmaṃ ca kāryaṃ cākāryam eva ca
adharmaṃ dharmam iti yā manyate tamasāvṛtā
dhṛtyā yayā dhārayate manaḥ-prāṇendriya-kriyāḥ
yayā tu dharma-kāmārthān dhṛtyā dhārayate ‘rjuna
yayā svapnaṃ bhayaṃ śokaṃ viṣādaṃ madam eva ca
sukhaṃ tv idānīṃ tri-vidhaṃ śṛṇu me bharata-rṣabha
yat tad-agre viṣam iva pariṇāme ‘mṛtopamam
viṣayendriya-saṃyogād yat tad-agre ‘mṛtopamam
yad agre cānubandhe ca sukhaṃ mohanam ātmanaḥ
na tad asti pṛthivyāṃ vā divi deveṣu vā punaḥ
brāhmaṇa-kṣatriya-viśāṃ śūdrāṇāṃ ca paraṃtapa
śamo damas tapaḥ śaucaṃ kṣāntir ārjavam eva ca
śauryaṃ tejo dhṛtir dākṣyaṃ yuddhe cāpy apalāyanam
kṛṣi-go-rakṣya-vāṇijyaṃ vaiśya-karma sva-bhāva-jam
sve sve karmaṇy abhirataḥ saṃsiddhiṃ labhate naraḥ
yataḥ pravṛttir bhūtānāṃ yena sarvam idaṃ tatam
śreyān sva-dharmo viguṇaḥ para-dharmāt svanuṣṭhitāt
saha-jaṃ karma kaunteya sa-doṣam api na tyajet
asakta-buddhiḥ sarvatra jitātmā vigata-spṛhaḥ
siddhiṃ prāpto yathā brahma tathāpnoti nibodha me
buddhyā viśuddhayā yukto dhṛtyātmānaṃ niyamya ca
vivikta-sevī laghv-āśī yata-vāk-kāya-mānasaḥ
ahaṃ-kāraṃ balaṃ darpaṃ kāmaṃ krodhaṃ parigraham
brahma-bhūtaḥ prasannātmā na śocati na kāṅkṣati
bhaktyā mām abhijānāti yāvān yaś cāsmi tattvataḥ
sarva-karmāṇy api sadā kurvāṇo mad-vyapāśrayaḥ
cetasā sarva-karmāṇi mayi saṃnyasya mat-paraḥ
mac-cittaḥ sarva-durgāṇi mat-prasādāt tariṣyasi
yad ahaṃ-kāram āśritya na yotsya iti manyase
sva-bhāva-jena kaunteya nibaddhaḥ svena karmaṇā
īśvaraḥ sarva-bhūtānāṃ hṛd-deśe ‘rjuna tiṣṭhati
tam eva śaraṇaṃ gaccha sarva-bhāvena bhārata
iti te jñānam ākhyātaṃ guhyād guhyataraṃ mayā
sarva-guhyatamaṃ bhūyaḥ śṛṇu me paramaṃ vacaḥ
man-manā bhava mad-bhakto mad-yājī māṃ namas kuru
sarva-dharmān parityajya mām ekaṃ śaraṇaṃ vraja
idaṃ te nātapaskāya nābhaktāya kadā-cana
ya idaṃ paramaṃ guhyaṃ mad-bhakteṣv abhidhāsyati
na ca tasmān manuṣyeṣu kaś-cin me priya-kṛttamaḥ
adhyeṣyate ca ya imaṃ dharmyaṃ saṃvādam āvayoḥ
śraddhāvān anasūyaś ca śṛṇuyād api yo naraḥ
kac-cid etac chrutaṃ pārtha tvayaikāgreṇa cetasā
arjuna uvāca
saṃjaya uvāca
vyāsa-prasādāc chrutavān etad guhyam ahaṃ param
rājan saṃsmṛtya saṃsmṛtya saṃvādam imam adbhutam
tac ca saṃsmṛtya saṃsmṛtya rūpam aty-adbhutaṃ hareḥ
yatra yogeśvaraḥ kṛṣṇo yatra pārtho dhanur-dharaḥ
saṃjaya uvāca
śrī-bhagavān uvāca
klaibyaṃ mā sma gamaḥ pārtha naitat tvayy upapadyate
arjuna uvāca
gurūn ahatvā hi mahānubhāvāñ
na caitad vidmaḥ kataran no garīyo
kārpaṇya-doṣopahata-svabhāvaḥ
na hi prapaśyāmi mamāpanudyād
saṃjaya uvāca
tam uvāca hṛṣīkeśaḥ prahasann iva bhārata
śrī-bhagavān uvāca
na tv evāhaṃ jātu nāsaṃ na tvaṃ neme janādhipāḥ
dehino ‘smin yathā dehe kaumāraṃ yauvanaṃ jarā
mātrā-sparśās tu kaunteya śītoṣṇa-sukha-duḥkha-dāḥ
yaṃ hi na vyathayanty ete puruṣaṃ puruṣa-rṣabha
nāsato vidyate bhāvo nābhāvo vidyate sataḥ
avināśi tu tad viddhi yena sarvam idaṃ tatam
antavanta ime dehā nityasyoktāḥ śarīriṇaḥ
ya enaṃ vetti hantāraṃ yaś cainaṃ manyate hatam
na jāyate mriyate vā kadā-cin
vedāvināśinaṃ nityaṃ ya enam ajam avyayam
vāsāṃsi jīrṇāni yathā vihāya
nainaṃ chindanti śastrāṇi nainaṃ dahati pāvakaḥ
acchedyo ‘yam adāhyo ‘yam akledyo ‘śoṣya eva ca
avyakto ‘yam acintyo ‘yam avikāryo ‘yam ucyate
atha cainaṃ nitya-jātaṃ nityaṃ vā manyase mṛtam
jātasya hi dhruvo mṛtyur dhruvaṃ janma mṛtasya ca
avyaktādīni bhūtāni vyakta-madhyāni bhārata
āścarya-vat paśyati kaś-cid enam
dehī nityam avadhyo ‘yaṃ dehe sarvasya bhārata
sva-dharmam api cāvekṣya na vikampitum arhasi
yadṛcchayā copapannaṃ svarga-dvāram apāvṛtam
atha cet tvam imaṃ dharmyaṃ saṃgrāmaṃ na kariṣyasi
akīrtiṃ cāpi bhūtāni kathayiṣyanti te ‘vyayām
bhayād raṇād uparataṃ maṃsyante tvāṃ mahā-rathāḥ
avācya-vādāṃś ca bahūn vadiṣyanti tavāhitāḥ
hato vā prāpsyasi svargaṃ jitvā vā bhokṣyase mahīm
sukha-duḥkhe same kṛtvā lābhālābhau jayājayau
eṣā te ‘bhihitā sāṃkhye buddhir yoge tv imāṃ śṛṇu
nehābhikrama-nāśo ‘sti pratyavāyo na vidyate
vyavasāyātmikā buddhir ekeha kuru-nandana
yām imāṃ puṣpitāṃ vācaṃ pravadanty avipaścitaḥ
kāmātmānaḥ svarga-parā janma-karma-phala-pradām
bhogaiśvarya-prasaktānāṃ tayāpahṛta-cetasām
traiguṇya-viṣayā vedā nistraiguṇyo bhavārjuna
yāvān artha udapāne sarvataḥ saṃplutodake
karmaṇy evādhikāras te mā phaleṣu kadācana
yoga-sthaḥ kuru karmāṇi saṅgaṃ tyaktvā dhanaṃjaya
dūreṇa hy avaraṃ karma buddhi-yogād dhanaṃjaya
buddhi-yukto jahātīha ubhe sukṛta-duṣkṛte
karma-jaṃ buddhi-yuktā hi phalaṃ tyaktvā manīṣiṇaḥ
yadā te moha-kalilaṃ buddhir vyatitariṣyati
śruti-vipratipannā te yadā sthāsyati niścalā
arjuna uvāca
śrī-bhagavān uvāca
duḥkheṣv anudvigna-manāḥ sukheṣu vigata-spṛhaḥ
yaḥ sarvatrānabhisnehas tat tat prāpya śubhāśubham
yadā saṃharate cāyaṃ kūrmo ‘ṅgānīva sarvaśaḥ
viṣayā vinivartante nirāhārasya dehinaḥ
yatato hy api kaunteya puruṣasya vipaścitaḥ
tāni sarvāṇi saṃyamya yukta āsīta mat-paraḥ
dhyāyato viṣayān puṃsaḥ saṅgas teṣūpajāyate
krodhād bhavati saṃmohaḥ saṃmohāt smṛti-vibhramaḥ
rāga-dveṣa-viyuktais tu viṣayān indriyaiś caran
prasāde sarva-duḥkhānāṃ hānir asyopajāyate
nāsti buddhir ayuktasya na cāyuktasya bhāvanā
indriyāṇāṃ hi caratāṃ yan mano ‘nuvidhīyate
tasmād yasya mahā-bāho nigṛhītāni sarvaśaḥ
yā niśā sarva-bhūtānāṃ tasyāṃ jāgarti saṃyamī
āpūryamāṇam acala-pratiṣṭhaṃ
vihāya kāmān yaḥ sarvān pumāṃś carati niḥspṛhaḥ
eṣā brāhmī sthitiḥ pārtha naināṃ prāpya vimuhyati
arjuna uvāca
vyāmiśreṇaiva vākyena buddhiṃ mohayasīva me
śrī-bhagavān uvāca
na karmaṇām anārambhān naiṣkarmyaṃ puruṣo ‘śnute
na hi kaś-cit kṣaṇam api jātu tiṣṭhaty akarma-kṛt
karmendriyāṇi saṃyamya ya āste manasā smaran
yas tv indriyāṇi manasā niyamyārabhate ‘rjuna
niyataṃ kuru karma tvaṃ karma jyāyo hy akarmaṇaḥ
yajñārthāt karmaṇo ‘nyatra loko ‘yaṃ karma-bandhanaḥ
saha-yajñāḥ prajāḥ sṛṣṭvā purovāca prajā-patiḥ
devān bhāvayatānena te devā bhāvayantu vaḥ
iṣṭān bhogān hi vo devā dāsyante yajña-bhāvitāḥ
yajña-śiṣṭāśinaḥ santo mucyante sarva-kilbiṣaiḥ
annād bhavanti bhūtāni parjanyād anna-saṃbhavaḥ
karma brahmodbhavaṃ viddhi brahmākṣara-samudbhavam
evaṃ pravartitaṃ cakraṃ nānuvartayatīha yaḥ
yas tv ātma-ratir eva syād ātma-tṛptaś ca mānavaḥ
naiva tasya kṛtenārtho nākṛteneha kaś-cana
tasmād asaktaḥ satataṃ kāryaṃ karma samācara
karmaṇaiva hi saṃsiddhim āsthitā janakādayaḥ
yad yad ācarati śreṣṭhas tat tad evetaro janaḥ
na me pārthāsti kartavyaṃ triṣu lokeṣu kiṃ-cana
yadi hy ahaṃ na varteyaṃ jātu karmaṇy atandritaḥ
utsīdeyur ime lokā na kuryāṃ karma ced aham
saktāḥ karmaṇy avidvāṃso yathā kurvanti bhārata
na buddhi-bhedaṃ janayed ajñānāṃ karma-saṅginām
prakṛteḥ kriyamāṇāni guṇaiḥ karmāṇi sarvaśaḥ
tattva-vit tu mahā-bāho guṇa-karma-vibhāgayoḥ
prakṛteḥ guṇa-saṃmūḍhāḥ sajjante guṇa-karmasu
mayi sarvāṇi karmāṇi saṃnyasyādhy-ātma-cetasā
ye me matam idaṃ nityam anutiṣṭhanti mānavāḥ
ye tv etad abhyasūyanto nānutiṣṭhanti me matam
sadṛśaṃ ceṣṭate svasyāḥ prakṛter jñānavān api
indriyasyendriyasyārthe rāga-dveṣau vyavasthitau
śreyān sva-dharmo viguṇaḥ para-dharmāt svanuṣṭhitāt
arjuna uvāca
śrī-bhagavān uvāca
dhūmenāvriyate vahnir yathādarśo malena ca
āvṛtaṃ jñānam etena jñānino nitya-vairiṇā
indriyāṇi mano buddhir asyādhiṣṭhānam ucyate
tasmāt tvam indriyāṇy ādau niyamya bharata-rṣabha
indriyāṇi parāṇy āhur indriyebhyaḥ paraṃ manaḥ
evaṃ buddheḥ paraṃ buddhvā saṃstabhyātmānam ātmanā
śrī-bhagavān uvāca
evaṃ paraṃ-parā-prāptam imaṃ rāja-rṣayo viduḥ
sa evāyaṃ mayā te ‘dya yogaḥ proktaḥ purātanaḥ
arjuna uvāca
śrī-bhagavān uvāca
ajo ‘pi sann avyayātmā bhūtānām īśvaro ‘pi san
yadā yadā hi dharmasya glānir bhavati bhārata
paritrāṇāya sādhūnāṃ vināśāya ca duṣkṛtām
janma karma ca me divyam evaṃ yo vetti tattvataḥ
vīta-rāga-bhaya-krodhā man-mayā mām upāśritāḥ
ye yathā māṃ prapadyante tāṃs tathaiva bhajāmy aham
kāṅkṣantaḥ karmaṇāṃ siddhiṃ yajanta iha devatāḥ
cātur-varṇyaṃ mayā sṛṣṭaṃ guṇa-karma-vibhāgaśaḥ
na māṃ karmāṇi limpanti na me karma-phale spṛhā
evaṃ jñātvā kṛtaṃ karma pūrvair api mumukṣubhiḥ
kiṃ karma kim akarmeti kavayo ‘py atra mohitāḥ
karmaṇo hy api boddhavyaṃ boddhavyaṃ ca vikarmaṇaḥ
karmaṇy akarma yaḥ paśyed akarmaṇi ca karma yaḥ
yasya sarve samārambhāḥ kāma-saṃkalpa-varjitāḥ
tyaktvā karma-phalāsaṅgaṃ nitya-tṛpto nirāśrayaḥ
nirāśīr yata-cittātmā tyakta-sarva-parigrahaḥ
yadṛcchā-lābha-saṃtuṣṭo dvaṃdvātīto vimatsaraḥ
gata-saṅgasya muktasya jñānāvasthita-cetasaḥ
brahmārpaṇaṃ brahma havir brahmāgnau brahmaṇā hutam
daivam evāpare yajñaṃ yoginaḥ paryupāsate
śrotrādīnīndriyāṇy anye saṃyamāgniṣu juhvati
sarvāṇīndriya-karmāṇi prāṇa-karmāṇi cāpare
dravya-yajñās tapo-yajñā yoga-yajñās tathāpare
apāne juhvati prāṇaṃ prāṇe ‘pānaṃ tathāpare
apare niyatāhārāḥ prāṇān prāṇeṣu juhvati
yajña-śiṣṭāmṛta-bhujo yānti brahma sanātanam
evaṃ bahu-vidhā yajñā vitatā brahmaṇo mukhe
śreyān dravya-mayād yajñāj jñāna-yajñaḥ paraṃtapa
tad viddhi praṇipātena paripraśnena sevayā
yaj jñātvā na punar moham evaṃ yāsyasi pāṇḍava
api ced asi pāpebhyaḥ sarvebhyaḥ pāpa-kṛttamaḥ
yathaidhāṃsi samiddho ‘gnir bhasmasāt kurute ‘rjuna
na hi jñānena sadṛśaṃ pavitram iha vidyate
śraddhāvāṃl labhate jñānaṃ tat-paraḥ saṃyatendriyaḥ
ajñaś cāśraddadhānaś ca saṃśayātmā vinaśyati
yoga-saṃnyasta-karmāṇaṃ jñāna-saṃchinna-saṃśayam
tasmād ajñāna-saṃbhūtaṃ hṛt-sthaṃ jñānāsinātmanaḥ
arjuna uvāca
śrī-bhagavān uvāca
jñeyaḥ sa nitya-saṃnyāsī yo na dveṣṭi na kāṅkṣati
sāṃkhya-yogau pṛthag bālāḥ pravadanti na paṇḍitāḥ
yat sāṃkhyaiḥ prāpyate sthānaṃ tad yogair api gamyate
saṃnyāsas tu mahābāho duḥkham āptum ayogataḥ
yoga-yukto viśuddhātmā vijitātmā jitendriyaḥ
naiva kiṃ-cit karomīti yukto manyeta tattva-vit
pralapan visṛjan gṛhṇann unmiṣan nimiṣann api
brahmaṇy ādhāya karmāṇi saṅgaṃ tyaktvā karoti yaḥ
kāyena manasā buddhyā kevalair indriyair api
yuktaḥ karma-phalaṃ tyaktvā śāntim āpnoti naiṣṭhikīm
sarva-karmāṇi manasā saṃnyasyāste sukhaṃ vaśī
na kartṛtvaṃ na karmāṇi lokasya sṛjati prabhuḥ
nādatte kasya-cit pāpaṃ na caiva sukṛtaṃ vibhuḥ
jñānena tu tad ajñānaṃ yeṣāṃ nāśitam ātmanaḥ
tad-buddhayas tad-ātmānas tan-niṣṭhās tat-parāyaṇāḥ
vidyā-vinaya-saṃpanne brāhmaṇe gavi hastini
ihaiva tair jitaḥ sargo yeṣāṃ sāmye sthitaṃ manaḥ
na prahṛṣyet priyaṃ prāpya nodvijet prāpya cāpriyam
bāhya-sparśeṣv asaktātmā vindaty ātmani yat sukham
ye hi saṃsparśa-jā bhogā duḥkha-yonaya eva te
śaknotīhaiva yaḥ soḍhuṃ prāk śarīra-vimokṣaṇāt
yo ‘ntaḥ-sukho ‘ntar-ārāmas tathāntar-jyotir eva yaḥ
labhante brahma-nirvāṇam ṛṣayaḥ kṣīṇa-kalmaṣāḥ
kāma-krodha-viyuktānāṃ yatīnāṃ yata-cetasām
sparśān kṛtvā bahir bāhyāṃś cakṣuś caivāntare bhruvoḥ
yatendriya-mano-buddhir munir mokṣa-parāyaṇaḥ
bhoktāraṃ yajña-tapasāṃ sarva-loka-maheśvaram
śrī-bhagavān uvāca
yaṃ saṃnyāsam iti prāhur yogaṃ taṃ viddhi pāṇḍava
ārurukṣor muner yogaṃ karma kāraṇam ucyate
yadā hi nendriyārtheṣu na karmasv anuṣajjate
uddhared ātmanātmānaṃ nātmānam avasādayet
bandhur ātmātmanas tasya yenātmaivātmanā jitaḥ
jitātmanaḥ praśāntasya paramātmā samāhitaḥ
jñāna-vijñāna-tṛptātmā kūṭa-stho vijitendriyaḥ
suhṛn-mitrāry-udāsīna-madhyastha-dveṣya-bandhuṣu
yogī yuñjīta satatam ātmānaṃ rahasi sthitaḥ
śucau deśe pratiṣṭhāpya sthiram āsanam ātmanaḥ
tatraikāgraṃ manaḥ kṛtvā yata-cittendriya-kriyaḥ
samaṃ kāya-śiro-grīvaṃ dhārayann acalaṃ sthiraḥ
praśāntātmā vigatabhīr brahmacāri-vrate sthitaḥ
yuñjann evaṃ sadātmānaṃ yogī niyata-mānasaḥ
nāty-aśnatas tu yogo ‘sti na caikāntam anaśnataḥ
yuktāhāra-vihārasya yukta-ceṣṭasya karmasu
yadā viniyataṃ cittam ātmany evāvatiṣṭhate
yathā dīpo nivāta-stho neṅgate sopamā smṛtā
yatroparamate cittaṃ niruddhaṃ yoga-sevayā
sukham ātyantikaṃ yat tad buddhi-grāhyam atīndriyam
yaṃ labdhvā cāparaṃ lābhaṃ manyate nādhikaṃ tataḥ
taṃ vidyād duḥkha-saṃyoga-viyogaṃ yoga-saṃjñitam
saṃkalpa-prabhavān kāmāṃs tyaktvā sarvān aśeṣataḥ
śanaiḥ śanair uparamed buddhyā dhṛti-gṛhītayā
yato yato niścarati manaś cañcalam asthiram
praśānta-manasaṃ hy enaṃ yoginaṃ sukham uttamam
yuñjann evaṃ sadātmānaṃ yogī vigata-kalmaṣaḥ
sarva-bhūta-stham ātmānaṃ sarva-bhūtāni cātmani
yo māṃ paśyati sarvatra sarvaṃ ca mayi paśyati
sarva-bhūta-sthitaṃ yo māṃ bhajaty ekatvam āsthitaḥ
ātmaupamyena sarvatra samaṃ paśyati yo ‘rjuna
arjuna uvāca
cañcalaṃ hi manaḥ kṛṣṇa pramāthi balavad dṛḍham
śrī-bhagavān uvāca
asaṃyatātmanā yogo duṣprāpa iti me matiḥ
arjuna uvāca
kac-cin nobhaya-vibhraṣṭaś chinnābhram iva naśyati
etan me saṃśayaṃ kṛṣṇa chettum arhasy aśeṣataḥ
śrī-bhagavān uvāca
prāpya puṇya-kṛtāṃl lokān uṣitvā śāśvatīḥ samāḥ
atha vā yoginām eva kule bhavati dhīmatām
tatra taṃ buddhi-saṃyogaṃ labhate paurva-dehikam
pūrvābhyāsena tenaiva hriyate hy avaśo ‘pi saḥ
prayatnād yatamānas tu yogī saṃśuddha-kilbiṣaḥ
tapasvibhyo ‘dhiko yogī jñānibhyo ‘pi mato ‘dhikaḥ
yoginām api sarveṣāṃ mad-gatenāntar-ātmanā
śrī-bhagavān uvāca
jñānaṃ te ‘haṃ sa-vijñānam idaṃ vakṣyāmy aśeṣataḥ
manuṣyāṇāṃ sahasreṣu kaś-cid yatati siddhaye
bhūmir āpo ‘nalo vāyuḥ khaṃ mano buddhir eva ca
apareyam itas tv anyāṃ prakṛtiṃ viddhi me parām
etad-yonīni bhūtāni sarvāṇīty upadhāraya
mattaḥ parataraṃ nānyat kiṃ-cid asti dhanaṃjaya
raso ‘ham apsu kaunteya prabhāsmi śaśi-sūryayoḥ
puṇyo gandhaḥ pṛthivyāṃ ca tejaś cāsmi vibhāvasau
bījaṃ māṃ sarva-bhūtānāṃ viddhi pārtha sanātanam
balaṃ balavatāṃ cāhaṃ kāma-rāga-vivarjitam
ye caiva sāttvikā bhāvā rājasās tāmasāś ca ye
tribhir guṇa-mayair bhāvair ebhiḥ sarvam idaṃ jagat
daivī hy eṣā guṇa-mayī mama māyā duratyayā
na māṃ duṣkṛtino mūḍhāḥ prapadyante narādhamāḥ
catur-vidhā bhajante māṃ janāḥ sukṛtino ‘rjuna
teṣāṃ jñānī nitya-yukta eka-bhaktir viśiṣyate
udārāḥ sarva evaite jñānī tv ātmaiva me matam
bahūnāṃ janmanām ante jñānavān māṃ prapadyate
kāmais tais tair hṛta-jñānāḥ prapadyante ‘nya-devatāḥ
yo yo yāṃ yāṃ tanuṃ bhaktaḥ śraddhayārcitum icchati
sa tayā śraddhayā yuktas tasyā rādhanam īhate
antavat tu phalaṃ teṣāṃ tad bhavaty alpa-medhasām
avyaktaṃ vyaktim āpannaṃ manyante mām abuddhayaḥ
nāhaṃ prakāśaḥ sarvasya yoga-māyā-samāvṛtaḥ
vedāhaṃ samatītāni vartamānāni cārjuna
icchā-dveṣa-samutthena dvaṃdva-mohena bhārata
yeṣāṃ tv anta-gataṃ pāpaṃ janānāṃ puṇya-karmaṇām
jarā-maraṇa-mokṣāya mām āśritya yatanti ye
sādhi-bhūtādhi-daivaṃ māṃ sādhi-yajñaṃ ca ye viduḥ
arjuna uvāca
adhi-yajñaḥ kathaṃ ko ‘tra dehe ‘smin madhusūdana
śrī-bhagavān uvāca
adhi-bhūtaṃ kṣaro bhāvaḥ puruṣaś cādhi-daivatam
anta-kāle ca mām eva smaran muktvā kalevaram
yaṃ yaṃ vāpi smaran bhāvaṃ tyajaty ante kalevaram
tasmāt sarveṣu kāleṣu mām anusmara yudhya ca
abhyāsa-yoga-yuktena cetasā nānya-gāminā
kaviṃ purāṇam anuśāsitāram
prayāṇa-kāle manasācalena
yad akṣaraṃ veda-vido vadanti
sarva-dvārāṇi saṃyamya mano hṛdi nirudhya ca
om ity ekākṣaraṃ brahma vyāharan mām anusmaran
ananya-cetāḥ satataṃ yo māṃ smarati nityaśaḥ
mām upetya punar-janma duḥkhālayam aśāśvatam
ā-brahma-bhuvanāl lokāḥ punar āvartino ‘rjuna
sahasra-yuga-paryantam ahar yad brahmaṇo viduḥ
avyaktād vyaktayaḥ sarvāḥ prabhavanty ahar-āgame
bhūta-grāmaḥ sa evāyaṃ bhūtvā bhūtvā pralīyate
paras tasmāt tu bhāvo ‘nyo ‘vyakto ‘vyaktāt sanātanaḥ
avyakto ‘kṣara ity uktas tam āhuḥ paramāṃ gatim
puruṣaḥ sa paraḥ pārtha bhaktyā labhyas tv ananyayā
yatra kāle tv anāvṛttim āvṛttiṃ caiva yoginaḥ
agnir jyotir ahaḥ śuklaḥ ṣaṇ-māsā uttarāyaṇam
dhūmo rātris tathā kṛṣṇaḥ ṣaṇ-māsā dakṣiṇāyanam
śukla-kṛṣṇe gatī hy ete jagataḥ śāśvate mate
naite sṛtī pārtha jānan yogī muhyati kaś-cana
vedeṣu yajñeṣu tapaḥsu caiva
śrī-bhagavān uvāca
rāja-vidyā rāja-guhyaṃ pavitram idam uttamam
aśraddadhānāḥ puruṣā dharmasyāsya paraṃtapa
mayā tatam idaṃ sarvaṃ jagad avyakta-mūrtinā
na ca mat-sthāni bhūtāni paśya me yogam aiśvaram
yathākāśa-sthito nityaṃ vāyuḥ sarvatra-go mahān
sarva-bhūtāni kaunteya prakṛtiṃ yānti māmikām
prakṛtiṃ svām avaṣṭabhya visṛjāmi punaḥ punaḥ
na ca māṃ tāni karmāṇi nibadhnanti dhanaṃjaya
mayādhyakṣeṇa prakṛtiḥ sūyate sa-carācaram
avajānanti māṃ mūḍhā mānuṣīṃ tanum āśritam
moghāśā mogha-karmāṇo mogha-jñānā vicetasaḥ
mahātmānas tu māṃ pārtha daivīṃ prakṛtim āśritāḥ
satataṃ kīrtayanto māṃ yatantaś ca dṛḍha-vratāḥ
jñāna-yajñena cāpy anye yajanto mām upāsate
ahaṃ kratur ahaṃ yajñaḥ svadhāham aham auṣadham
pitāham asya jagato mātā dhātā pitā-mahaḥ
gatir bhartā prabhuḥ sākṣī nivāsaḥ śaraṇaṃ suhṛt
tapāmy aham ahaṃ varṣaṃ nigṛhṇāmy utsṛjāmi ca
trai-vidyā māṃ soma-pāḥ pūta-pāpā
te taṃ bhuktvā svarga-lokaṃ viśālaṃ
ananyāś cintayanto māṃ ye janāḥ paryupāsate
ye ‘py anya-devatā-bhaktā yajante śraddhayānvitāḥ
ahaṃ hi sarva-yajñānāṃ bhoktā ca prabhur eva ca
yānti deva-vratā devān pitṝn yānti pitṛ-vratāḥ
patraṃ puṣpaṃ phalaṃ toyaṃ yo me bhaktyā prayacchati
yat karoṣi yad aśnāsi yaj juhoṣi dadāsi yat
śubhāśubha-phalair evaṃ mokṣyase karma-bandhanaiḥ
samo ‘haṃ sarva-bhūteṣu na me dveṣyo ‘sti na priyaḥ
api cet sudurācāro bhajate mām ananya-bhāk
kṣipraṃ bhavati dharmātmā śaśvac-chāntiṃ nigacchati
māṃ hi pārtha vyapāśritya ye ‘pi syuḥ pāpa-yonayaḥ
kiṃ punar brāhmaṇāḥ puṇyā bhaktā rāja-rṣayas tathā
man-manā bhava mad-bhakto mad-yājī māṃ namas kuru
